visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on an older man with graying hair, wearing a light gray suit jacket over a striped collared shirt. He is seated at a table, intently eating from a white bowl with chopsticks. The table is cluttered with other small dishes. In the background, other people are seated, slightly out of focus. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera remains steady, maintaining its focus on the man as he eats. A man speaks in a calm, slightly weary tone, asking, "Then I can release them?" Another man replies in a casual and agreeable voice, "Sure, anytime." The camera cuts to a close-up of a different man with short, dark hair, seen in profile. He wears a light blue collared shirt and a lanyard around his neck. He looks off-screen with a serious and contemplative expression. The background is dark and indistinct, with the blurred figure of another person standing behind him.
